/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/ZWave.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ZWave.dir/src/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ZWave.dir/src/Entity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ZWave.dir/src/Player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ZWave.dir/src/Zombie.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ZWave.dir/src/Weapon.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ZWave.dir/src/Bullet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ZWave.dir/src/Wave.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ZWave.dir/src/HUD.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ZWave.dir/src/Menu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ZWave.dir/src/FileManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ZWave.dir/src/ResourceManager.cpp.o -o ZWave  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/josue/Documents/progra2/Z-Ware/UTN-TP-juego/build/_deps/sfml-build/lib _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-graphics.2.6.2.dylib _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-window.2.6.2.dylib _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-audio.2.6.2.dylib _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-system.2.6.2.dylib
